mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_logs ( entity_type, entity_id, action, old_values, new_values, user_id, ip_address, user_agent, created_at ) VALUES ( #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{action}, #{oldValues}, #{newValues}, #{userId}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, entity_type AS entityType, entity_id AS entityId, action, old_values AS oldValues, new_values AS newValues, user_id AS userId, ip_address AS ipAddress, user_agent AS userAgent, created_at AS createdAt FROM audit_logs WHERE entity_type = #{entityType} AND entity_id = #{entityId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, entity_type AS entityType, entity_id AS entityId, action, old_values AS oldValues, new_values AS newValues, user_id AS userId, ip_address AS ipAddress, user_agent AS userAgent, created_at AS createdAt FROM audit_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, entity_type AS entityType, entity_id AS entityId, action, old_values AS oldValues, new_values AS newValues, user_id AS userId, ip_address AS ipAddress, user_agent AS userAgent, created_at AS createdAt FROM audit_logs WHERE action = #{action} AND created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, entity_type AS entityType, entity_id AS entityId, action, old_values AS oldValues, new_values AS newValues, user_id AS userId, ip_address AS ipAddress, user_agent AS userAgent, created_at AS createdAt FROM audit_logs WHERE entity_type = 'SECURITY' AND created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY created_at DESC
